concept: Legacy by 1004319 Alberta Ltd:** This real-time strategy game puts players in command of the "Order" nation's stick figure army, tasked with mining gold, building diverse units (Swordwrath, Speartons, Archidons, Magikill, Giants), and leading them to destroy enemy statues and capture territories. Players can control individual units or entire formations, utilizing each unit's unique strengths in tactical combat against other nations. Progression is extensive, featuring a Classic Campaign, a Saga-style map with weekly Missions, an Endless Deads zombie survival mode, and a Tournament mode to win the "Crown of Inamorta," all playable across Normal, Hard, and Insane difficulties. Monetization includes in-app purchases for powerful weapons, armor, and cosmetic skins, each offering unique perks to enhance unit capabilities.
name: Stick War: Legacy
